title: mentha × villosa
intro: Mentha × villosa, also known as woolly mint or hairy mint, is a hybrid species of mint that is a cross between Mentha aquatica and Mentha viridis. The mentha × villosa plant has been used for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues, nausea, and headaches. The health benefits of mentha × villosa include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Mentha × villosa can be consumed as a tea, added to salads or desserts, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and essential oils to harness its medicinal properties.
